creator: admin@cpcnw.co.uk
text:
After loading up a minimal install of 7.2 and accepting the default shell, I noticed that the UK currency key is inactive [£] at the console. When the key is pressed the system beeps. Oddly at 'Login:' if I press the key I get the £ symbol but as soon as I am logged in as a user I get a beep. All the other keys are correct. If I plug in my 7.1 disc I get the £ symbol no problem. I have tried a re-install [minimal] with a different [full size ps2] keyboard to no avail. I have tried various keymaps and fonts and still no £ symbol.

The motherbaord is an ASUS M2N68-AM [not sure what the kb controller chip is]
